headline: CNBC Daily Open: China sets lowest growth target in decades
summary: That target at 4.5% to 5% marks a downgrade from the “around 5%” set in the past three years.

headline: Forget Nvidia: This Networking Giant Just Landed $2.1 Billion in AI Orders, and Nobody’s Talking About It
summary: There’s a “dead” company reawakening right now, and very few people are talking about it. During the second quarter of fiscal 2026, Cisco (NASDAQ:CSCO) pulled in $2.1 billion in AI infrastructure orders from hyperscalers like AWS, Microsoft (NASDAQ:MSFT), and Google (NASDAQ:GOOG, NASDAQ:GOOGL), up from $1.3 billion just the quarter before. That single-quarter figure actually matched ... Forget Nvidia: This Networking Giant Just Landed $2.1 Billion in AI Orders, and Nobody’s Talking About It
